candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure for the income statement; matches definition of total revenue/sales.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: This is an expense classified as cost of sales, not revenue.
Selling expense, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not the income statement revenue total.
Liability related to deferred revenue, not the revenue flow itself.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Deferred revenue liability; not the income statement revenue line.
Deferred revenue liability; not current period revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges
candidates.why: Aggregated direct costs of materials and traffic charges; best representation of cost of sales/COGS.
Component of COGS but not full cost of sales; prefer aggregate line when available.
Another component of COGS, but the combined line better matches total COGS.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses - Cost of Sales
candidates.why: Specific subset of cost of sales (rental/lease); not the main aggregate COGS measure.

candidates.row_label: Costs of materials and traffic charge - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/adjustment line, not an economic cost; should be excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and traffic charges

candidates.why: Core operating overhead (personnel) typically part of SG&A; no 'Total' wording and clearly not COGS or D&A.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component, no 'Total' wording.
This is income, not expense; should be excluded from SG&A expense components.
Share-based compensation is an SG&A-type overhead cost; appropriate to include as SG&A component.
Mixed income/expense labeled item; ambiguous, better to rely on clearer expense-only lines above.
Balance sheet asset classification, not a P&L expense; exclude from SG&A components.
Accumulated depreciation (balance sheet contra-asset), not period SG&A expense for our purposes.
Net asset balance, not an expense flow.
Accumulated depreciation on admin assets; balance sheet item, not SG&A expense selection target.

variables.notes: Selected multiple expense components in line with instructions; avoided income/mixed or balance sheet items and any totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; directly matches XRD definition.
Consolidated interest expense amount; best representation of total interest cost.
Alternative interest measure but appears unused/empty; less clear than main 'Interest Expenses' line.
Capitalized interest, not the expense recognized in P&L; should not be primary XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to leases; subset of total interest cost.
Component of interest expense excluding leases; subset of total interest cost.
Represents profit attributable to minorities, not interest on debt.
Duplicate concept of non-controlling interests; not interest on debt.
Generic label but appears unused here; explicit populated 'Interest Expenses' is preferred.
Same as 'Interest Capitalised'; capitalized, not expensed interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; subset, not total interest cost.
Balance sheet liability, not an interest expense flow.
Liabilities classification; not interest expense.
Liabilities classification; not interest expense.
Long-term debt balance; not the P&L interest expense.
Liabilities classification; not interest expense.
Liability descriptor; not interest expense.
Liability descriptor; not interest expense.
Equity interest of minority shareholders; not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity, not interest expense.
Generic and not populated in preview; less clear than 'Interest Expenses' line on income statement.
Income attribution line, not a balance sheet equity stock; unsuitable for BE.
Income statement item; not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA
candidates.why: Represents parent shareholders' equity; a valid shareholders' equity measure.
Component category only; not total equity.
Total equity figure, but there is also a lowercase 'Total equity' line that appears to be the final total including NCI.
Consolidated total equity (including non-controlling interest) matching total on balance sheet; best choice for book equity/total equity.
Income statement share of profit attributable to non-controlling interests; indicates presence of minority interest but not the balance sheet stock.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests in income statement; again flows, not stock.
Balance sheet carrying amount of non-controlling interests; best match for minority interest (MIB).
Alternative label for same balance sheet item; either would work but 'Non-controlling interest' is more standard.
